dverse 0.0.0.9003
  • Reference
    • Get started
  • Changelog

Create a data.frame with documentation metadata of one or more packages

Source: R/document_universe.R
document_universe.Rd

Create a data.frame with documentation metadata of one or more packages. If you develop a universe, such as the tidyverse or tidymodels, dverse helps you to easily create a universe-wide reference for the pkgdown website of your meta-package.

Usage

document_universe(
  x,
  url_template = NULL,
  url = NULL,
  packages = NULL,
  strip_s3class = TRUE
)

Arguments

x

A character vector giving concepts or package names to match.

url_template

Character. A template to generate links to documentation based on the column names of the output – typically package and topic, e.g. "https://maurolepore.github.io/{package}/reference/{topic}.html" (glue::glue() syntax).

url

Character vector of length-1 giving a base url, e.g. "https://maurolepore.github.io/".

packages

A character vector with the names of packages to limit the search, or NULL to serach in all known libraries.

strip_s3class

TRUE removes the class component of S3 methods.

Value

A dataframe.

Examples

document_universe("datasets")
#>                    topic
#> 1          AirPassengers
#> 2                BJsales
#> 3                    BOD
#> 4                    CO2
#> 5            ChickWeight
#> 6                  DNase
#> 7         EuStockMarkets
#> 8           Formaldehyde
#> 9           HairEyeColor
#> 10          Harman23.cor
#> 11          Harman74.cor
#> 12              Indometh
#> 13          InsectSprays
#> 14        JohnsonJohnson
#> 15             LakeHuron
#> 16      LifeCycleSavings
#> 17              Loblolly
#> 18                  Nile
#> 19                Orange
#> 20         OrchardSprays
#> 21           PlantGrowth
#> 22             Puromycin
#> 23                Theoph
#> 24               Titanic
#> 25           ToothGrowth
#> 26         UCBAdmissions
#> 27        UKDriverDeaths
#> 28          UKLungDeaths
#> 29                 UKgas
#> 30           USAccDeaths
#> 31             USArrests
#> 32        USJudgeRatings
#> 33 USPersonalExpenditure
#> 34              VADeaths
#> 35              WWWusage
#> 36           WorldPhones
#> 37           ability.cov
#> 38              airmiles
#> 39            airquality
#> 40              anscombe
#> 41                attenu
#> 42              attitude
#> 43               austres
#> 44               beavers
#> 45                  cars
#> 46              chickwts
#> 47                   co2
#> 48               crimtab
#> 49      datasets-package
#> 50           discoveries
#> 51                 esoph
#> 52                  euro
#> 53              eurodist
#> 54              faithful
#> 55                freeny
#> 56                infert
#> 57                  iris
#> 58               islands
#> 59                    lh
#> 60               longley
#> 61                  lynx
#> 62                morley
#> 63                mtcars
#> 64                nhtemp
#> 65                nottem
#> 66                   npk
#> 67    occupationalStatus
#> 68                precip
#> 69            presidents
#> 70              pressure
#> 71                quakes
#> 72                 randu
#> 73                rivers
#> 74                  rock
#> 75                 sleep
#> 76             stackloss
#> 77                 state
#> 78         sunspot.month
#> 79          sunspot.year
#> 80              sunspots
#> 81                 swiss
#> 82              treering
#> 83                 trees
#> 84                 uspop
#> 85               volcano
#> 86            warpbreaks
#> 87                 women
#>                                                                                              alias

#> 77 state, state.abb, state.area, state.center, state.division, state.name, state.region, state.x77
#> 78                                                                                   sunspot.month

#> 87                                                                                           women
#>                                                              title
#> 1                      Monthly Airline Passenger Numbers 1949-1960
#> 2                                Sales Data with Leading Indicator
#> 3                                        Biochemical Oxygen Demand
#> 4                            Carbon Dioxide Uptake in Grass Plants
#> 5                   Weight versus age of chicks on different diets
#> 6                                             Elisa assay of DNase
#> 7  Daily Closing Prices of Major European Stock Indices, 1991-1998
#> 8                                    Determination of Formaldehyde
#> 9                        Hair and Eye Color of Statistics Students
#> 10                                              Harman Example 2.3
#> 11                                              Harman Example 7.4
#> 12                                Pharmacokinetics of Indomethacin
#> 13                                  Effectiveness of Insect Sprays
#> 14                  Quarterly Earnings per Johnson & Johnson Share
#> 15                                   Level of Lake Huron 1875-1972
#> 16                            Intercountry Life-Cycle Savings Data
#> 17                                   Growth of Loblolly Pine Trees
#> 18                                          Flow of the River Nile
#> 19                                          Growth of Orange Trees
#> 20                                       Potency of Orchard Sprays
#> 21                      Results from an Experiment on Plant Growth
#> 22                      Reaction Velocity of an Enzymatic Reaction
#> 23                                Pharmacokinetics of Theophylline
#> 24                           Survival of passengers on the Titanic
#> 25          The Effect of Vitamin C on Tooth Growth in Guinea Pigs
#> 26                               Student Admissions at UC Berkeley

#> 28                     Monthly Deaths from Lung Diseases in the UK

#> 39                               New York Air Quality Measurements
#> 40     Anscombe's Quartet of 'Identical' Simple Linear Regressions
#> 41                               The Joyner-Boore Attenuation Data
#> 42                              The Chatterjee-Price Attitude Data
#> 43     Quarterly Time Series of the Number of Australian Residents
#> 44                          Body Temperature Series of Two Beavers
#> 45                            Speed and Stopping Distances of Cars
#> 46                                    Chicken Weights by Feed Type
#> 47                         Mauna Loa Atmospheric CO2 Concentration
#> 48                                   Student's 3000 Criminals Data

#> 51                       Smoking, Alcohol and (O)esophageal Cancer
#> 52                             Conversion Rates of Euro Currencies
#> 53         Distances Between European Cities and Between US Cities
#> 54                                        Old Faithful Geyser Data

#> 56              Infertility after Spontaneous and Induced Abortion
#> 57                                      Edgar Anderson's Iris Data
#> 58                           Areas of the World's Major Landmasses
#> 59                            Luteinizing Hormone in Blood Samples

#> 61                        Annual Canadian Lynx trappings 1821-1934
#> 62                                   Michelson Speed of Light Data
#> 63                                      Motor Trend Car Road Tests
#> 64                        Average Yearly Temperatures in New Haven
#> 65           Average Monthly Temperatures at Nottingham, 1920-1939
#> 66                          Classical N, P, K Factorial Experiment
#> 67                   Occupational Status of Fathers and their Sons
#> 68                               Annual Precipitation in US Cities

#> 71                               Locations of Earthquakes off Fiji
#> 72                Random Numbers from Congruential Generator RANDU

#> 77                                      US State Facts and Figures
